title: Verify per-backend test coverage completeness
description: PRD §4 requires complete per-backend test suites. Verify that each of the 6 backends (AgenticStore, OPFS, NodeFs, Memory, SQLite, LocalStorage) has dedicated test coverage for: get/set/delete/list/scan/stat. Check test/backends/ and test/*.test.js for coverage. Create missing per-backend test files if any backend lacks dedicated tests. Target: PRD §4 gap 'Complete per-backend test suites'.
